metadata.name: Mahogany
metadata.title: Mahogany Laser Cleaning Settings
metadata.description: Detailed machine settings, parameter relationships, diagnostic procedures, and troubleshooting guides for optimizing mahogany laser cleaning operations.

author.name: Todd Dunning
author.title: MA
credentials: MA Optics and Photonics, UC Irvine, 2019
author.imageAlt: Todd Dunning, MA, Junior Optical Materials Specialist at Coherent Inc., with precision optics tools

powerRange.description: Optimal average power for Mahogany surface cleaning without charring

wavelength.description: Near-IR wavelength for optimal absorption in Mahogany lignin and cellulose

spotSize.description: Beam spot diameter for precise surface cleaning control

repetitionRate.description: Optimal repetition rate for efficient cleaning with thermal management

energyDensity.description: Fluence threshold for effective contaminant removal without wood damage

pulseWidth.description: Pulse duration for controlled ablation of surface contaminants

scanSpeed.description: Optimal scanning speed for uniform cleaning coverage

passCount.description: Number of cleaning passes for complete surface treatment

overlapRatio.description: Beam overlap percentage for uniform cleaning pattern

dwellTime.description: Effective dwell time per spot for contaminant removal
